name: Malicious Chrome Extension Detected
description: Detects the installation of known malicious Chrome extensions by their IDs.

prompts.prompt: High-severity alert: A known malicious Chrome extension has been detected on a system. This indicates potential persistence or malicious activity targeting user Browse. Event Details: **Installed At** {installed_at}, **Extension Name** {name}, **Identifier** {identifier}, **Version** {version}, **Path** {path}. Immediately investigate this malicious extension, determine its origin, and remove it from all affected browsers and systems.

parameters.name: installed_at
parameters.description: The timestamp when the Chrome extension was installed.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the detected Chrome extension.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path where the Chrome extension is located.
